  bash: allow

<!-- Generated by @oisincoveney/pipeline. -->
<!-- @oisincoveney/pipeline:host=opencode -->

Configured orchestrator:
model: gpt-5
tools: read, list, grep, glob, bash
rules: test-first, verification
skills: dogfood-orchestrator
mcp_servers: dogfood-knowledge-base
filesystem: read-only
network: inherit
hooks: dogfood-workflow-start

Instructions: .pipeline/prompts/orchestrator.md

Run workflow `default` for the user task.
These nodes are not OpenCode native routes.
CLI routes:
- research: codex CLI profile=pipeline-researcher command=`codex exec --json -C <repo-root> --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check <node prompt>` needs=none
- red: codex CLI profile=pipeline-test-writer command=`codex exec --json -C <repo-root> --sandbox workspace-write --skip-git-repo-check <node prompt>` needs=research
- green: codex CLI profile=pipeline-code-writer command=`codex exec --json -C <repo-root> --sandbox workspace-write --skip-git-repo-check <node prompt>` needs=red
- acceptance: codex CLI profile=pipeline-acceptance-reviewer command=`codex exec --json -C <repo-root> --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check <node prompt>` needs=green
- verify: codex CLI profile=pipeline-verifier command=`codex exec --json -C <repo-root> --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check <node prompt>` needs=acceptance
- learn: codex CLI profile=pipeline-learner command=`codex exec --json -C <repo-root> --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check <node prompt>` needs=verify

For each CLI node prompt include:
- user task
- workflow id: default
- node id
- profile id
- runner id
- profile instructions reference
- profile grants
- dependency outputs

Do not use `pipe`, `oisin-pipeline`, or package scripts to execute workflow nodes.
Do not claim these nodes are OpenCode subagents.
